# Optional: use vLLM with numba 0.63.x (avoids conflict with released vLLM's numba==0.61.2).
# Install after main requirements, or run:
#   pip install -r requirements.txt
#   pip install -r requirements-vllm-numba063.txt
#
# (First line is the extra index for vLLM nightly wheels.)
--extra-index-url https://wheels.vllm.ai/nightly
vllm --pre
numba>=0.63.0
